testcase.name: test_user_excel_alias_headers_generate_success[100]

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_excel_alias_batch_regression.py:41: in test_user_excel_alias_headers_generate_success assert response.status_code == 200, response.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_api_root_health

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))

testcase.failure:
